scripts.test: cross-env NODE_ENV=test NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-vm-modules dotenv_config_path=.env.test node -r dotenv/config ./node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js --runInBand
scripts.docker:migrate: docker compose exec api npm run migrate
scripts.docker:psql: docker compose exec db psql -U postgres -d walletdb
scripts.docker:setup: docker compose up --build -d && docker compose exec api npm run migrate
scripts.docker:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up --build -d && docker compose exec api npm run migrate
scripts.docker:clean: docker compose down -v --remove-orphans && docker system prune -f
